outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Negative aggregate GEX (-5.1B) amplifies volatility; dealers sell dips and buy rips.
outlook.summary: Market is trapped in a negative gamma regime with heavy structural support at 640. Spot is pinned to 0DTE Max Pain (657), acting as an immediate magnet. A break of 640 triggers accelerative selling.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put Open Interest confluence: 127k (Weekly) + 106k (Monthly) + 16k (0DTE). Primary dealer hedge anchor.
0DTE Max Pain level (657.0) is virtually identical to Spot (656.59). Strong magnetic attraction for end-of-day settlement.
Dominant Call OI in 0DTE (21k) with rising IV. Immediate short-term resistance cap.
Monthly Max Pain at 675. Serves as the macro target for mean reversion if volatility subsides.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: LOW: Positive aggregate GEX suppresses volatility
outlook.summary: Market pinned in positive gamma territory (1.22B Total GEX). Dealers will sell rallies into 24400 and buy dips near 24200, creating a tight consolidation range. Expect mean-reversion behavior.

levels.motivazione: Dominant Call OI (513) in Weekly expiry acts as primary resistance. Aligned with dealer short gamma hedging limit.
Massive Put OI (1549) in Monthly expiry defines structural support. Institutional hedging floor.
0DTE Gamma Flip level. Transition zone between positive and negative gamma. Critical intraday pivot.
Monthly Max Pain level. Strong magnetic attraction for expiry. Current spot is hovering near this level.
Extreme volume spike (977) on 0DTE puts vs low OI indicates tactical short-term hedging or speculative attack.
